title: [MTR4] Low Effort Eidan 6000
description: Low Effort Tokyo Metro 'Eidan' 6000 for MTR mod!
body:
# Low Effort Eidan 6000
![Banner image for LERT Eidan 6000, featuring the 2 window variants available in the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa765cc7f32f997a72ff82f2c06ca583567617bc.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pWFznfVIjxc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This resource pack adds the Tokyo Metro 6000 series (Eidan 6000) for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, with it being a remodelled version of the Eidan 9000 from the base MTR mod.

## Variants
- Big window
  - Normal
    - VVVF motor
    - GTO motor
    - Chopper Control motor
  - Small
    - VVVF motor
    - GTO motor
    - Chopper Control motor
  - Mini
    - VVVF motor
    - GTO motor
    - Chopper Control motor
- Small window
  - Normal
    - VVVF motor
    - GTO motor
    - Chopper Control motor
  - Small
    - VVVF motor
    - GTO motor
    - Chopper Control motor
  - Mini
    - VVVF motor
    - GTO motor
    - Chopper Control motor
